Roll the dice and dive back in!

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!

title: Watcher of Realms
notes:
1. [Anniversary Celebration]
The Anniversary Celebration events are launching soon, bringing tons of rewarding events!

2. [New Raids]
Challenge the brand‑new Gallery of War and Final Frontier.

3. [Faction Trial]
New [Arbitration and Dominion] stages are now available, featuring new Bosses and mechanics!

4. [Adjustments & Optimizations]
Enhanced and adjusted multiple heroes. Increased the Background Auto-fight speed to 6x.

title: ONE PUNCH MAN: The Strongest
notes:
1. Server merge.
2. [Mirage Store] The weekly exchange limit for rare gems has been adjusted to 2x.
3. Other optimizations and adjustments.

title: Hero Wars: Alliance RPG
notes:
Twilight falls on Dominion.

The team’s back together.
New Twilight Skins for Guus, Artemis, and Tristan — the Way of Honor stands strong.

Guus and Tristan also get a Skin+.
Dominion is under control.
